title: Arlong Park Reveals Its Power — Part 6
scene: On page 21, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. The scale of Arlong’s rule becomes clearer as the fish-men dominate the island and its people.
summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
